label: Layout fill interior parms
description: Parameters for filling the interior of a room with things. The element name is the ThingDef defName (the 'def' field).

def.label: Thing
def.description: ThingDef to place in the room interior. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

stuff.label: Stuff
stuff.description: Material (ThingDef) used when the placed thing is stuffable.

fixedRot.label: Fixed rotation
fixedRot.description: Forces placed things to a specific rotation. Omit to use random or default rotation.

alignWithRect.label: Align with rect
alignWithRect.description: When true, things are aligned to the room rectangle rather than placed freely.

contractedBy.label: Contracted by
contractedBy.description: How many cells the placement area is contracted inward from the room edge.

snapToGrid.label: Snap to grid
snapToGrid.description: When true, placement positions are snapped to a grid.

countRange.label: Count range
countRange.description: Fixed count range override. Uses IntRange.Invalid to derive count from thingsPerHundredCells instead.

thingsPerHundredCells.label: Things per hundred cells
thingsPerHundredCells.description: Random range for how many things are placed per 100 room cells.
